description: CLI argument and option structure for mytokens command

ARG.label: <screen>
ARG.description: Positional argument for selecting display screen

OPT_LAST.label: --last <days>
OPT_LAST.description: Show data for last N days

OPT_APPS.label: --apps <apps>
OPT_APPS.description: Comma-separated list of apps to include

OPT_SKIP_APPS.label: --skip-apps <apps>
OPT_SKIP_APPS.description: Comma-separated list of apps to exclude

OPT_MODES.label: --modes <modes>
OPT_MODES.description: Comma-separated list of modes to include

OPT_SKIP_MODES.label: --skip-modes <modes>
OPT_SKIP_MODES.description: Comma-separated list of modes to exclude

OPT_MODELS.label: --models <models>
OPT_MODELS.description: Comma-separated list of models to include

OPT_SKIP_MODELS.label: --skip-models <models>
OPT_SKIP_MODELS.description: Comma-separated list of models to exclude

OPT_PROJECTS.label: --projects <projects>
OPT_PROJECTS.description: Comma-separated list of projects to include

OPT_SKIP_PROJECTS.label: --skip-projects <projects>
OPT_SKIP_PROJECTS.description: Comma-separated list of projects to exclude

OPT_PROVIDERS.label: --providers <providers>
OPT_PROVIDERS.description: Comma-separated list of providers to include

OPT_SKIP_PROVIDERS.label: --skip-providers <providers>
OPT_SKIP_PROVIDERS.description: Comma-separated list of providers to exclude

mutex_groups.name: time_grouping
mutex_groups.description: Time grouping options are mutually exclusive

mutex_groups.name: date_range
mutex_groups.description: Date range options are mutually exclusive
